title: Outbound Message Sync Flow
interaction_flow: Caller → SyncEngine: start()  [or notifyNewOutbound()]
SyncEngine → SyncEngine: _scheduleOutbound(delayMs)  [setTimeout, 500ms on start / 100ms on notify]
SyncEngine → OutboundSync: flush(channel='evomap-hub')
OutboundSync → MailboxStore: pollOutbound({ channel, limit: MAX_BATCH=50 })  → returns pending[]
alt pending.length === 0: OutboundSync → SyncEngine: return { sent: 0 }
OutboundSync → MailboxStore: getState('node_id')  → senderId
OutboundSync → Hub: POST /a2a/mailbox/outbound  { sender_id, proxy_protocol_version, messages[] }  [30s timeout]
Hub → OutboundSync: 200 { results: [{ id, status, response?, error? }] }
loop for each result in results:
alt status === 'accepted'|'ok': OutboundSync → updates[]: push { id, status:'synced' }
alt status === 'failed'|'rejected': OutboundSync → MailboxStore: incrementRetry(id, error)  [if retry_count < MAX_RETRIES=10] OR push { id, status:'failed' }
alt result.response present: OutboundSync → inboundMessages[]: push { type, payload, refId, channel }
OutboundSync → MailboxStore: updateStatusBatch(updates)  [marks synced/failed, evicts from index]
OutboundSync → MailboxStore: writeInboundBatch(inboundMessages)  [if any hub responses]
OutboundSync → MailboxStore: setState('last_sync_at', ISO-timestamp)
OutboundSync → SyncEngine: return { sent, synced, responses }
SyncEngine: if result.sent > 0 → _lastActivity = Date.now()
SyncEngine → MailboxStore: countPending({ direction:'outbound' })  → decide next delay
alt pending > 0: SyncEngine → SyncEngine: _scheduleOutbound(1_000)
alt pending === 0: SyncEngine → SyncEngine: _scheduleOutbound(5_000)  [DEFAULT_OUTBOUND_INTERVAL]
alt AuthError thrown: SyncEngine → SyncEngine: _handleAuthError('outbound')  → calls onAuthError()
trigger_paths: Normal timer path: start() → _scheduleOutbound(500) → recurring loop (1s if pending, else 5s)
Fast-path: notifyNewOutbound() → clears existing timer → _scheduleOutbound(100)  [only if !_outPending]
key_relationships: SyncEngine depends_on MailboxStore (shared with OutboundSync via constructor injection)
OutboundSync depends_on MailboxStore: pollOutbound, getState, updateStatusBatch, writeInboundBatch, incrementRetry, setState
OutboundSync depends_on lifecycle/manager: AuthError (thrown on HTTP 401/403)

SyncEngine.constructor: ({ store, hubUrl, getHeaders, logger, onInboundReceived, onAuthError })

OutboundSync.flush: async (channel='evomap-hub') → { sent, synced, responses } | { sent:0, error }

MailboxStore.pollOutbound: ({ channel, limit }) → Message[]  [sorted by priority then created_at, status==='pending' only]

important_notes: MAX_BATCH=50 messages per flush; MAX_RETRIES=10 before marking failed
Hub endpoint: POST {hubUrl}/a2a/mailbox/outbound with 30s AbortSignal timeout
Hub can return inline responses (result.response) that are written back as inbound messages
MailboxStore is JSONL-backed with in-memory index; messages persisted to messages.jsonl
_outPending flag prevents re-entrant outbound flushes during notifyNewOutbound()
Timer is unref()'d (won't block Node.js process exit)
SyncEngine also runs inbound polling concurrently on its own timer (separate flow)
